title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Define the core domain logic for URL shortening including value objects and entities.
steps.done_condition: Core domain logic implemented and tested.

steps.description: Define port interfaces for URL management including creating, retrieving, and managing URLs.
Implement in-memory storage adapter for URLs ensuring it conforms to the domain models.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage adapter implemented and tested.

steps.description: Implement HTTP handlers for the REST API to translate requests to internal API calls.
Integrate the use cases logic to handle application-specific requirements for URL shortening.
steps.done_condition: Use case logic implemented and tested.

steps.description: Wiring adapters to ports in the composition root to facilitate integration.
steps.done_condition: Composition root wired correctly with no issues.

steps.description: Conduct end-to-end tests to validate the functionality of the URL shortener REST API.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests pass successfully with correct API responses.

successCriteria: Successful implementation of URL shortener API with in-memory storage.
All tests pass and the application meets the specified requirements.
